title: Seoul
subtitle: Seoul · 서울 · 5 routes
meta: South Korea - palaces, hills, markets, museums, and the Hangang
practicalNote: April-May and September-October are usually easier for long walks. In summer, plan around heat, heavy rain, and typhoon season; in winter, expect cold, and check forecast plus fine dust before outdoor routes. Use metro or taxi between the Hangang, Yongsan, Namsan, and the old center: walking distances stretch quickly on the map.
